codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Algo salió mal. Please try again shortly.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not connect a server. Please check your internet connection y try again.
codes.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: server took too long a respond. Please try again.
codes.BACKEND_HOST_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach server. Please check your internet connection y try again.
codes.SECURE_CONNECTION_FAILED: Secure connection failed. Check backend HTTPS certificate.
codes.CONFLICT: This update conflicts con newer saved clinical data
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check highlighted fields y try again.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: Algo salió mal while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect a server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: requested record could not be found. Please actualizar y try again.
codes.ADMISSION_NOT_FOUND: admission record could not be found. Please return a seguimiento y try again.
codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not guardar your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment y try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An error occurred while cargando this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid Correo electrónico o Contraseña. Please check your details y try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please seleccionar a tenant.
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Iniciar sesión again a continuar.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This Correo electrónico is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid o expired
codes.HOME_SUMMARY_LOAD_FAILED: No se puede cargar Inicio summary
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: No se puede guardar admission record. Verifica tu conexión e inténtalo de nuevo
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some obligatorio admission details are missing. Please revisar highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable a generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still revisar y guardar admission.
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_LOAD_FAILED: No se puede cargar admission form. Verifica tu conexión e inténtalo de nuevo
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: No se puede guardar local admission draft. Please try again

privacy.title: Privacidad
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences y session data are stored only on this device. Sinthing is sent a external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If En línea AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent a configured services.

about.title: Acerca de
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype para reference y training. Sint para clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support y advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, o determine ventilador Configuración.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against paciente, your centro workflow, y local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Obligatorio before continuing a clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device y will be sincronizado when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Revisar safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data y uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible para paciente care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in centro context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active centro y rol shown by your session. Keep records within correct centro workflow y follow local escalation, revisar, y approval procedures.

inputs.title: Introduceing inputs
inputs.body: Use Ingresar a introduce available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Opcional ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing opcional data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a guardar blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations mostrar advisory ventilador setting references con a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align con your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only y verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Monitoreo y alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a Recomendación, use Monitoreo a log vitals y labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds y should be assessed according a local protocol.

offline.title: Sin conexión behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Ingresar, advisory summaries, monitoreo) works Sin conexión. Data is saved locally. Opcional AI features require connectivity. When Atrás En línea, continuar as normal.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume y oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory a expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Volumen corriente (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, y pH, tied a a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance y verification state para a reference range. Only active approved o verified ranges are eligible para active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need revisar before dataset o training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue para revisar decisions, corrections, exclusions, y audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current Sin conexión, En línea, o syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden desde normal clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; introduce SpO₂ y otro vitals when available. para better matching, agregar PaO₂, PaCO₂, y pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app Sin conexión
offline.body: Ingresar, advisory summaries, y monitoreo work Sin conexión. Data is stored locally. Opcional AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not obligatorio para core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, pendiente, retired, rejected, y unverified ranges are not eligible para active decision-support display. Revisar source, version, scope, y verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness ayuda is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness y shadow-mode details are visible only a approved governance roles. Sinrmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs revisar
needsReview.body: Use revisar queue a check submitted data, request correction, aprobar eligible records, o excluir records con an audit motivo.

guides.home: Revisar centro context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, y records needing revisar before opening a paciente workflow.
guides.admit: Capture paciente pathway y available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly y revisar backend-confirmed calculations after guardar.
guides.tracking: Use seguimiento a scan recent ventilation status y revisar needs. Read trend flags con source data y local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture para de-identified candidate records. Human revisar is obligatorio before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use revisar queue a aprobar, request correction, o excluir records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards para aggregate quality, revisar, reference, y governance status. Avoid paciente identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use Configuración para cuenta, centro, accessibility, privacidad, sync, y reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Revisar FiO₂ y PEEP; consider recruitment; check para shunt o V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Revisar minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation y perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols y clinical judgment.

ai.label: Soporte de decisión con IA

ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, y uncertain values. Ventilador Configuración are suggested on siguiente step desde dataset.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single nombre–value pair. Opcional; you can skip this step.

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs o otro metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used para trend analysis y monitoreo after you start session. Opcional; you can agregar points later on monitoreo screen.
